name: X-Golf Scarsdale
about: X-Golf Scarsdale is an indoor golf simulator venue offering 10 state-of-the-art simulators for play, training, and entertainment. The facility provides a full-service experience with a food and beverage menu, including a full liquor bar, and hosts leagues, tournaments, and private events. Pricing is per bay, per hour, with varying rates depending on the day and time, and memberships offering discounted rates and priority booking.
why_golfers_like_it: 10 state-of-the-art golf simulators with camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors for unparalleled accuracy
Flexible league formats including 1-night events and multi-week scrambles for different skill levels
Full-service sports bar with TVs and a variety of food and drink options

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen available with a published food menu.
Full liquor bar available with a published drinks menu.

simulator_hardware.notes: Proprietary simulator system featuring a combination of camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, club rental is available on-site. You can also use your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted as the venue has its own full kitchen and bar.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It takes approximately one hour for one person to play 18 holes. For each additional person, add roughly one hour to the total time.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, children of all ages are welcome.
